seoTitle: Golden Valley vs Gordon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Golden Valley and Gordon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Golden Valley vs Gordon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Golden Valley and Gordon.
heading: Golden Valley vs Gordon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Golden Valley, Tasmania and Gordon, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gordon has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Golden Valley (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Golden Valley or Gordon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Golden Valley has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Gordon scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Golden Valley scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Gordon scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Golden Valley or Gordon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gordon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
